name: Brownies with Peanut Butter Topping
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Firmly Packed Light Brown Sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Sift flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt onto wax paper.
3. Beat butter, sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract in a medium-sized bowl with an electric mixer until fluffy.
4. Stir in dry ingredients; beat until smooth.
5. Fold in 1/2 cup of the chopped nuts.
6. Pour mixture into a greased 13x9x2 inch pan.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
8. Remove pan from oven to wire rack and sprinkle with peanut butter chips.
9. Let stand about 5 minutes, then spread evenly with a small metal spatula.
10. Sprinkle with remaining nuts, patting gently.
11. Cool; cut into bars.
